subcodes.first_line: This is a remembrance from Our presence unto those who have turned towards God, the All-Subduing, the Self-Subsisting, and have testified to that whereunto God Himself hath testified [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا ذکر من لدنا للذین اقبلوا الی الله المهیمن القیوم و شهدوا بما شهد الله الا
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
